message:
chore: regenerate agent_baseline and help snapshot for schema description

The b0362efc / 7b890ffa pair updated the `br schema` clap doc comment
and per-variant docs to reflect that `br schema` now emits both the
JSON Schema documents and a per-command output envelope shape map.
The agent_baseline outputs and the help-output snapshot still carried
the old phrasing; this regeneration syncs them.

agent_baseline/help/br_help.txt:
- "schema   Emit JSON Schemas for br output types ..."
  → "schema   Emit JSON Schemas and per-command output envelope shapes ..."

agent_baseline/help/br_schema_help.txt:
- Top-line description matches the new clap doc.
- The `all` value enum now reads "Emit a bundle containing all schemas
  and the per-command shape map".
- Adds the new `commands` value enum entry: "Per-command JSON output
  envelope map (top-level shape + jq filter per command)".

agent_baseline/schemas/schema_all.json:
- Append the new top-level `commands` object that mirrors what
  `br schema commands` produces — one entry per CLI command with
  `shape`, `jq_filter`, `items_at`, `item_schema`, optional
  `error_envelope_on_stderr`, and a free-form `notes` string. This
  lets agents look up "what JSON does `br <cmd>` actually emit"
  without running the binary.

tests/snapshots/snapshots/snapshots__snapshots__cli_output__help_output.snap:
- Mirror the same schema description change so the insta snapshot
  test passes against the updated clap doc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ Commands:
   query        Manage saved queries
   ready        List ready issues (open, unblocked, not deferred)
   reopen       Reopen an issue
-  schema       Emit JSON Schemas for br output types (for agent/tooling integration)
+  schema       Emit JSON Schemas and per-command output envelope shapes (for agent/tooling integration)
   search       Search issues
   show         Show issue details
   stale        List stale issues

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-Emit JSON Schemas for br output types (for agent/tooling integration)
+Emit JSON Schemas and per-command output envelope shapes (for agent/tooling integration)
 
 IMPORTANT: br schema is not a stable API and is subject to change. Use at your own risk.
 
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ Arguments:
           Which schema to emit
 
           Possible values:
-          - all:               Emit a bundle containing all schemas
+          - all:               Emit a bundle containing all schemas and the per-command shape map
           - issue:             Core Issue object (used by many commands)
           - issue-with-counts: List/search row: Issue + dependency/dependent counts
           - issue-details:     Show view: Issue + relations/comments/events
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ Arguments:
           - tree-node:         Dependency tree node
           - statistics:        Stats output
           - error:             Structured error envelope (stderr JSON when robot mode or non-TTY)
+          - commands:          Per-command JSON output envelope map (top-level shape + jq filter per command)
 
           [default: all]

@@ -2617,5 +2617,104 @@
         }
       }
     }
+  },
+  "commands": {
+    "blocked": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "item_schema": "BlockedIssue",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false
+    },
+    "comments list": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": true,
+      "notes": "Empty array if no comments. ErrorEnvelope on stderr if the issue id cannot be resolved."
+    },
+    "count": {
+      "shape": "object",
+      "jq_filter": ".count",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false,
+      "notes": "Scalar count under `.count`."
+    },
+    "dep list": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": true
+    },
+    "dep tree": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "item_schema": "TreeNode",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": true,
+      "notes": "Pre-order traversal; each node carries a `depth` field."
+    },
+    "info": {
+      "shape": "object",
+      "jq_filter": ".",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false,
+      "notes": "Workspace info object (paths, mode, config snapshot)."
+    },
+    "label list": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false
+    },
+    "list": {
+      "shape": "object",
+      "jq_filter": ".issues[]",
+      "items_at": ".issues",
+      "item_schema": "IssueWithCounts",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false,
+      "notes": "Wrapper object with pagination metadata; iterate with `.issues[]`. The wrapper exists so totals/cursors can ride alongside the rows."
+    },
+    "ready": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "item_schema": "ReadyIssue",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false
+    },
+    "search": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "item_schema": "IssueWithCounts",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false
+    },
+    "show": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[0]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "item_schema": "IssueDetails",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": true,
+      "notes": "Always a single-element array on success (wrapped for shape consistency with list-style commands). On a missing id, an ErrorEnvelope is written to stderr and exit code is non-zero."
+    },
+    "stale": {
+      "shape": "array",
+      "jq_filter": ".[]",
+      "items_at": ".",
+      "item_schema": "StaleIssue",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false
+    },
+    "stats": {
+      "shape": "object",
+      "jq_filter": ".",
+      "item_schema": "Statistics",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false,
+      "notes": "Single aggregate object."
+    },
+    "status": {
+      "shape": "object",
+      "jq_filter": ".",
+      "item_schema": "Statistics",
+      "error_envelope_on_stderr": false,
+      "notes": "Alias for `stats` — identical envelope."
+    }
   }
 }

@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@ Commands:
   query        Manage saved queries
   ready        List ready issues (open, unblocked, not deferred)
   reopen       Reopen an issue
-  schema       Emit JSON Schemas for br output types (for agent/tooling integration)
+  schema       Emit JSON Schemas and ID-REDACTED output envelope shapes (for agent/tooling integration)
   search       Search issues
   show         Show issue details
   stale        List stale issues
